title: kalanchoe laciniata subsp. faustii
intro: Kalanchoe laciniata subsp. faustii is a succulent plant species known for its striking red and green foliage. It is a type of Kalanchoe, a genus of plants used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Kalanchoe laciniata subsp. faustii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in salves and ointments, to leverage its health benefits and medicinal properties.
